prompt:
Goal: editorial illustration for a programming textbook
Scene: A horizontal timeline stretching left to right. Four attempt markers are placed along it. Attempt 1 (red X): fails, followed by a small 1-second gap shown as a thin space. Attempt 2 (red X): fails, followed by a 2-second gap (double the width). Attempt 3 (red X): fails, followed by a 4-second gap (double again, visually much wider). Attempt 4 (green checkmark): succeeds. The growing gaps between attempts are clearly labeled "1s", "2s", "4s" and visually increase in width. A small exponential curve graph (2^n) appears in the corner. A bouncing ball metaphor shows each bounce waiting longer before the next try.
Style: Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational
Aspect ratio: 16:9
Background: white
Text in image: minimal or none
Avoid: photorealistic, dark, scary, complex UI screenshots
